title: Opening 3-Second Hook Intelligence
description: The first 3 seconds should immediately establish why the viewer should care. Strong openings combine curiosity with clear context. Slow intros reduce retention in short-form content.
hook_patterns: Establish viewer relevance in the first sentence
Combine curiosity with immediate context clarity
Avoid slow preamble before the core message
Use high-energy opening to capture attention fast
Direct value proposition in the first frame
